hero.title: EduPrompt
hero.description: Generate teaching prompts quickly to support lessons, discussions, and learning activities.

differences.title: Move from teaching intent to a usable prompt
differences.description: EduPrompt helps educators quickly create prompts for learning activities and discussion.

items.title: Teaching-focused input
items.description: Start with the learning need or activity you want to support.

items.title: Quick prompt generation
items.description: Create a usable starting point without drafting from scratch.

items.title: Flexible refinement
items.description: Adjust the prompt to fit the lesson and learners.

feel.title: A practical starting point for teaching
feel.description: The workflow reduces blank-page effort while keeping the educator in control.

items.title: Describe the need
items.description: State the lesson, discussion, or activity goal.

items.title: Generate a prompt
items.description: Receive a focused starting point quickly.

items.title: Adapt for use
items.description: Refine the result for the learning context.

audiences.title: Who uses EduPrompt
audiences.description: Useful for people preparing teaching and learning activities.

items.title: Teachers
items.description: Create prompts for lessons, discussions, and classroom activities.

items.title: Tutors
items.description: Prepare focused prompts for individual or group learning.

items.title: Trainers
items.description: Develop prompts that support workshops and professional learning.

resourceSection.title: Prompt preparation essentials
resourceSection.description: Turn a teaching need into a prompt that can be adapted for use.

items.title: Teaching context
items.description: Describe the learning need behind the prompt.

items.title: Generated prompt
items.description: Use a quick draft as the starting point.

items.title: Educator refinement
items.description: Adjust the wording and scope for the learners.

groupedSection.title: Prompts for learning activities
groupedSection.description: Use generated prompts as starting points across common teaching contexts.

items.name: Discussion
items.description: Open a focused conversation around a topic.

items.name: Reflection
items.description: Encourage learners to examine their understanding.

items.name: Activity
items.description: Frame a task that helps learners use an idea.

items.name: Review
items.description: Prompt learners to revisit key learning.

technicalSection.title: Built for reusable teaching prompts
technicalSection.description: EduPrompt follows the shared Ansiversa mini-app architecture.

finalCta.title: Ready to create a teaching prompt?
finalCta.description: Open EduPrompt and describe the learning activity you want to support.
